title: Hammer That Glass!
description: Break glass blocks to make them intangible, with a hammer.
body:
This is a Forge 1.20.1 MCreator mod that adds a hammer and an intangible glass block.

To get started, you will have to put an iron pickaxe in the center of a crafting table. Adjacent to it will be 4 glass blocks in that crafting grid.

How it should look:
```
I = Iron Pickaxe
G = Glass Block
- = Nothing

- G -
G I G
- G -
```

Once you have made your hammer, you can now right click glass blocks with it to turn them into broken glass blocks. You can walk through broken glass blocks. You can do the same by crafting the hammer with a glass block, which damages the hammer as usual, and outputs a broken glass block.
